title: Artistry
description: Draw your custom paintings with your friends!
body:
---
Description # Artistry Artistry allows you to completely decorate the world with your own drawings and 2D block compositions. ## Features - **Posters:** Artistry adds posters to the game. Posters can be hung on walls, and you can draw on them directly in the world, even with a friend! All changes are immediately visible in the world to other players. Or you can draw on the poster in your hand and then hang it up—it's up to you. - **Compatibility:** The posters are compatible with each other. By placing several posters next to each other, you can create even larger paintings and compositions. - **Editor:** In the editor, you can switch between the block and color palette, change the size of the tool and the tool itself. - **Live Drawing:** All drawings are displayed live, and you can also draw with a friend on the same poster at the same time.
Config There is only one parameter in the config: ```json { "network": { "batchIntervalMs": 50 } } ``` This parameter is responsible for the frequency of canvas updates in the world. If the server is large, it is better to increase this value to avoid lags, but the live-drawing display will not be as smooth as with small values
*** ## Dev journal ### The ability to add images, pixelate them in Minecraft style, a full HEX palette, and much more will be added soon ### Preview *** ![Pixelization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67f64a609c2452bfc370a9885afb99ef28662dc.png) *** ![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e056a94f714fada1701ebc74260c2c7de1d2ede0.png) *** ![In-world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfed50d900ad2a6af22e7ee20bca9728af2d0c79.png) ***
